texto: This is the one and onlyfirmament
autor: thereforeit is the absolute world.There is no other world.The circle is complete.I am living in Eternity.The ways of this worldare the ways of Heaven.
explicacao: Citação de thereforeit is the absolute world.There is no other world.The circle is complete.I am living in Eternity.The ways of this worldare the ways of Heaven. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This is the one and onlyfirmament” articula reflexao, allen-ginsberg, onlyfirmament em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
